help_mode_descriptor_t(3) Library Functions Manual help_mode_descriptor_t(3)

NAME

help_mode_descriptor_t - Mode descriptor for programmatic MODES generation (for help output).

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/options/builder.h>

Data Fields


const char * name
Mode name (e.g., server",client). const char * description
Mode description (e.g., Runasmulti-clientvideochatserver").

Detailed Description

Mode descriptor for programmatic MODES generation (for help output).

Definition at line 321 of file builder.h.

Field Documentation

const char* help_mode_descriptor_t::description

Mode description (e.g., "Run as multi-client video chat server").

Definition at line 323 of file builder.h.

const char* help_mode_descriptor_t::name

Mode name (e.g., "server", "client").

Definition at line 322 of file builder.h.
